## Summary
- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation
- [ ] docs reviewed locally
- [ ] links or paths checked
- [ ] no credentials, state, or private artifacts added

## Ensemble Impact
- [ ] Oracle or bot-role docs changed
- [ ] MT5 or cTrader track affected
- [ ] docs-only or no runtime impact expected

## Notes
- follow-up work, tradeoffs, or assumptions
